examples.question: 本月处理时长是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(resolution_days), 2) AS value FROM customer_complaint

examples.question: 本月是否已解决是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(is_resolved), 2) AS value FROM customer_complaint

examples.question: 本月库存数量(吨)是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(stock_qty_mt), 2) AS value FROM inventory WHERE snapshot_yearmth = '202603'

examples.question: 本月安全库存(吨)是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(safety_stock_mt), 2) AS value FROM inventory WHERE snapshot_yearmth = '202603'

examples.question: 本月入库数量(吨)是多少？

examples.question: 本月供应天数是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(days_of_supply), 2) AS value FROM inventory WHERE snapshot_yearmth = '202603'

examples.question: 本月计划工时是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(scheduled_hours), 2) AS value FROM overtime_hours

examples.question: 本月作业人数是多少？

examples.question: 本月加班成本是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(overtime_cost), 2) AS value FROM overtime_hours

examples.question: 本月延迟天数是多少？

examples.question: 本月滚动计划数量(吨)是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(rllng_planqty_mt), 2) AS value FROM rolling_plan WHERE stats_yearmth = '202603'

examples.question: 本月工厂发货计划数量(吨)是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(plant_shipgds_plan_mt), 2) AS value FROM rolling_plan WHERE stats_yearmth = '202603'

examples.question: 本月交货数量是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty), 2) AS value FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time) = '202603'

examples.question: 本月交货数量(吨)是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt), 2) AS value FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time) = '202603'

examples.question: 本月交货金额是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(deliv_dlvry_amt), 2) AS value FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time) = '202603'

examples.question: 本月是否外部调拨是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(is_external_transfer), 2) AS value FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time) = '202603'

examples.question: 本月单位吨物流成本是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(logistics_cost_per_mt), 2) AS value FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time) = '202603'

examples.question: 本月订单数量是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(order_qty), 2) AS value FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date) = '202603'

examples.question: 本月订单数量(吨)是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(order_qty_mt), 2) AS value FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date) = '202603'

examples.question: 本月订单净金额是多少？
examples.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(order_net_amt), 2) AS value FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date) = '202603'

examples.question: 按工厂名称看库存数量(吨)
examples.sql: SELECT plant_descrptn, ROUND(SUM(stock_qty_mt), 2) AS value FROM inventory WHERE snapshot_yearmth = '202603' GROUP BY plant_descrptn ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

examples.question: 按物料名称看实际产量(吨)
examples.sql: SELECT mat_name, ROUND(SUM(actual_qty_mt), 2) AS value FROM production_output WHERE record_yearmth = '202603' GROUP BY mat_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

examples.question: 按客户名称看是否已解决
examples.sql: SELECT customer_name, ROUND(SUM(is_resolved), 2) AS value FROM customer_complaint GROUP BY customer_name ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

examples.question: 按工厂名称看加班成本
examples.sql: SELECT plant_descrptn, ROUND(SUM(overtime_cost), 2) AS value FROM overtime_hours GROUP BY plant_descrptn ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20
